description: This tool has served me a lot at work, since it has allowed me to monitor all employees and verify all the work they do. In addition, it contains a very intuitive and powerful interface. It also has excellent functions that make it very professional.
author: Vanessa W.
pros: Teramid seems an excellent tool, since its functionality is effective and very fluid, I like it because it allows me to monitor remotely and has the ability to record videos easily.
cons: The only thing I do not like this tool is that when I try to log in, it is a bit slow the procedure, as it tries to recover my password and has complicated functions for beginners.

author: Muhammad B.
pros: screen recording, web n apps monitoring, system logs
cons: time doctor has not feature of hiding log out access from clients, so clients log out time doctor according to their will which is not good technique for monitoring tool. tera mind is providing these feature in their apps
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Lots of features, security features, screen recording
cons: Bad UI, not flexible, bad customer support, lots of features I don't need etc.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: This software has allowed us to save from a potential data breach and being able to catch people leaving who tried to take our IP. Very good software. A bit on the expensive side but worth every penny.
author: Milena L.
pros: Easy to look at a glance at what is being monitored Functionality is easy to get around Has a great GUI.
cons: It would be good to drill down to a specific time as opposed to date. It can take a few pages to get to a specific time in a day to check on something.

review_title: Teramind is your eyes on your company
description: Teramind is an amazing software and it has so much features than i can't even remember all of them. I've done a lot of tests with other solutions and i couldn't find any that satisfyed my needs, but Teramind do!
author: Andrigo F.
pros: I think Teramind is the only solution that provied all the features that i searched in a solution like this. The best feature certainly is the video recording and live video streamming. I cannot find that feature in any other solution, and while it is available on Teramind, it provides even more that i was looking for, like remote control of the monitored machines and 6 months of video recording saved on cloud, for EACH monitored computer.
cons: It is an expensive software. Even choosing the on-premise version (which should be the cheaper option), it costs a lot. I think they could lower the price, so they can sell more.

review_title: Its has been an amazing expericence and a winderfull software that does exactly what you want!
description: Security, Control, peace of mind. the ability to know all that is going in the organization
author: Rene H.
pros: Very easy to use! friendly"! I love the layout and how its organized. it gives you real data! its has given us the proteccion that we need!
cons: For the mac integration there are more funcitons to be added like the pc version! the downloading of the videos takes time and sometime there are issues.

author: Livio B.
pros: Teramind is helping us tremendously to measure employee time efficiency and effectiveness.
cons: Sometimes the recording agent slows computers down.

description: Great idea for tracking staff productivity
author: Will C.
pros: The interface looks very good and the level of detail you can get access to makes this a great bit of software for tracking staff. The ability to view a users system live is a great tool. I loved the idea of email tracking
cons: I was very excited about the email tracking but after testing this out multiple times and contacting support turns out they don't support multiple features like this on a mac Mac not supported Network monitoring Emails File Transfers Behavior Rules Didn't see one mention of this on their website so wasted 1 hour setting this up.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great experience so far, every HR should try this solution
author: Faith T.
pros: Easy to use and monitor activities, I like the privacy features of the software as well Performance review is easy as well as tracking activities done hence improve productivity
cons: The costing for five user for my small organization, they can increase number of users or consider the chargers. We can get a free version for 30 days so as to recommend the s/w to others
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Kasey B.
pros: I haven't used this software much, but in the past i found it to be pretty easy to use in the past. Obviously designed to help larger organizations with more employees, the software was intuitive and provided a lot of interesting features. I personally loved the ability to printing sensitive documents with a little more protection and enforcing some compliance issues. This is often a problem in higher education that too many people simply ignore.
cons: I've heard the price was a little high, but I honestly cannot really say for sure as I do not deal in that area. Though their support team were helpful, unlike many other software companies.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best way and tools to supervise and control employees access to data, and their actions.
description: Ability to monitor and supervise employee activity with minimum manpower resources.
author: Yakir D.
pros: The ability to monitor and track with a variety of useful tools the approach and actions of employees with sensitive information. The option to set alerts and actions automatically when violating information security rules by an employee. It is excellent, saves resources and enables control and peace of mind with sensitive information. Receiving an indication of working time on different software enables me and the CEO to monitor employee productivity, along with an examination of the efficiency of the software with which they work. These tools allows me to detect waste of time by employees and wasting company resources.
cons: Remote control is not good enough, I think improvement in the feature will make the product excellent and save me the need for a third-party solution for remote control and employee support. There is a need to improve: Remote controlled graphics. Speed and delay time. Enable, choice whether to notify the user about remote control or not. Transfer file to remote control screen. I think there should be several different price packages, To enable selection when not all functions are used. and by that allow to reducing costs.

review_title: Convenient and comprehensive cloud based PC monitoring software.
description: Remote user time management, security risk mitigation, and productivity enhancements.
author: Larissa H.
pros: It's easy to install, access, and monitor client PCs . This is a mature and feature-rich solution for on-premise and remote user monitoring. It can be configured so users know they're being monitored; there's also a silent install option so that users aren't aware the software is installed or that they're being monitored. Customer support is easy to contact via the website (chat feature) or email.
cons: There was some firewall and anti-virus configuration necessary, which was somewhat time consuming and not mentioned by sales, but their support staff was able to assist in resolving our issues. This is a somewhat more expensive solution than others we researched, but it also has the most features.

description: All good so far, except the issue that it keeps getting disconnected and I think the system really requires a fast and stable internet connection so everything that's being captured from your PC is uploaded in real-time.
author: YURI S.
pros: I like it when it records videos of the screen activities of our remote employees. It just gives us more peace of mind about what they are all doing throughout the day at work.
cons: What I don't really like about it is just it constantly gets disconnected. Maybe cause of the bandwidth issues as the system captures videos of all your screen activities, so it would constantly reboot and all just to make sure all recorded videos are uploaded on the server.

author: raizy F.
pros: Service is great
cons: nothing ,did not have any problems since I started using it.

author: din D.
pros: The live screen viewing, and strokes recording
cons: it doesn't work well on mac computers.

description: really great experience using teramind. would recommend
author: Kerri M.
pros: If you have employees that work remotely and you want to track their work this is the right thing for you
cons: this is really a great software. you can view your employees live screen which is the best feature of all

review_title: Amazing product, easy to use for monitoring.
description: We were able to find out why some employees were not as productive.
author: Charles S.
pros: Super easy to use, the file and keyword alerts are very helpful. It also has a real-time preview in the dashboard.
cons: The only thing for my manager did not like was the price. She was wanting just 2 users and the smallest option was 5 users.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use, the data you need. Bit expensive though and support is not as good as it should be.
description: Got the data I needed, the simple installation & configuration were a joy, and the hidden running of the software worked perfectly, which was very impressive considering the amount of data it was gathering in the background. The user didn't notice it at all, which is critical to a secret monitoring product.
author: Ben M.
pros: Very easy to use, though a little fiddly to get working (need to pinhole firewall and add AV exclusions in my case). Installation itself is dead simple, but getting it to report needs those aforementioned, at least in my case. The data that it gathers and the reports that you can get are excellent, management is easy. Very difficult to find software that does PC monitoring and gives you the data you need in an easily accessible way with minimal, simple configuration. Best option I have found, certainly.
cons: A bit expensive for the sort of deployment they are thinking of (permanent, corporate). Acceptable for my uses though, which are probably more common (temporary, individual). The support is also a bit lacking - chat/email only and can be slow or needing multiple prompts for communication. I also don't like how if there is an outage of reporting it doesn't seem to be possible to get logs from the software that would indicate the reason why. I have asked and received no response from their support staff, which was irritating.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Perry L.
pros: You can track your employees work and progress
cons: It's really a great software. I would recommend it.

author: Mena I.
pros: I love the functionality of the overall program. It offers me peace of mind in the sense that I can know what is going on and set triggers for potential issues and threats.
cons: Very slow to load. Sometimes, it does not pull up the live feed and I have to double check that the software has not been discovered. Also, It does not recognize the email platform we use so we are in the dark about that. That is a very big deal.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: System is a little too complex, but that is due to the amount of features it includes.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ability to view multiple computers at once, and have remote access. The labelling of activities within the system, allows for easy sorting.
cons: Complexity, I feel that alot of the information is duplicative on many pages. It would be best to try and centralize all the computers to one page and filter from there.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Teramind has give me the insight I need to track the trouble users
author: Preston B.
pros: I can see how productive my users are, and you can look for flags that can tip you off if they are going to quit or trying to steal sensitive data.
cons: The initial setup was difficult because our anitvirus software kept on thinking it was a virus. so we eventually had to remove antivirus for it to work.

review_title: We are happy extremely happy with the overall product and the Customer service is outstanding.
author: Jesse D.
pros: We like the ability to view staff productivity and performance, we not only utilise this internally but for our customers. The video capture feature is useful in our industry as we utilise this for forensic evidence.
cons: The rules can be a bit of a hassle to setup, not having a clear guide on how these should be set up can delay the install process.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Software does the job that is needed. User friendly and on point.
author: Mike G.
pros: The things I like the most about this software are the screen shots and video of items that are being monitored. The tool is straightforward and easy to use. Setup is really quick. Default items to monitor are a big help.
cons: The think I like the least is the Price. It would be nice if it was cheaper on a yearly basis. Then I would roll it out to the entire organization.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent product, easy to install, easy to use
author: Jose C.
pros: Very simple and straightforward to install and use. No problems with firewalls or whatsoever. It simple works!
cons: It is a little bit expensive, I would suggest to have an entry level price mode with a basic fee per agent and limited to one week data, and then pay more if you really need to store longer periods. In any case is the best product in market.
